lines.text: Kayak Rentals | Walt Disney World Resort
Kayak Rentals at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort and Campground
Chart your own course at your own pace on the serene waterways of the Resort.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Enjoy a family paddling adventure on our scenic streams and ponds.
Rental location: The Bike Barn at the Meadow Recreation Area
Rentals are available on a first-come, first-served basis.
Guests must be 18 years of age or over and will need to present a valid driver's license, state-issued ID or Military ID to rent a kayak.
A parent or guardian over 18 years of age can also sign for a minor 12 and up to rent a kayak on their own.
Complimentary life jackets must be worn.
During peak times of the year, only Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort Guests or Guests with dining or recreation reservations may be allowed to enter the Resort hotel area to park.
Call the Bike Barn at (407) 824-2932 for more information. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.
Learn about Canoe rentals at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort and Campground.
Times for Kayak Rentals at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort and Campground
